input.content:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV PATH=/usr/local/go/bin:$PATH

# Install system dependencies and Go
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    build-essential \
    git \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Go 1.25
RUN curl -fsSL https://go.dev/dl/go1.25.5.linux-amd64.tar.gz -o /tmp/go.tar.gz && \
    tar -C /usr/local -xzf /tmp/go.tar.gz && \
    rm /tmp/go.tar.gz

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy the run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
